ActionItems: Review monthly subscriptions and mentorship session volume.
BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Break-even review for Heather Cole's peer-mentorship consulting and pre-launch blog line.

CurrentState.Note: Small side-practice run alongside full-time clinical work; goal is to cover subscription costs.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: A handful of monthly mentorship sessions covers fixed software and hosting costs.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed monthly costs divided by average net per mentorship session.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Reaching break-even keeps the consulting line self-funding without touching household budget.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Consulting line — break-even
